title: lanthorus polycarpus
intro: Lanthorus polycarpus, also known as the "Pang Da Hai" or "Pang Da", is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-oxidant effects. The health benefits of Lanthorus polycarpus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
